seedanceSegments.title: Neige parmesan et suer
seedanceSegments.description: Râpé fin, échalotes prêtes, beurre mousse, suer, torréfaction riz sec.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Opening stays texture-first; scene 2 in logical board pays off aromatics after cold cheese powder.
seedanceSegments.risk: Avoid anonymous powder that could read as flour; keep parmesan warm yellow-white.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: fine grate; butter foam sizzle; rice clatter; spatula scrape

seedanceSegments.title: Risotto et confetti verts
seedanceSegments.description: Déglace vin, louches, crème du riz, transfert, pois persil parmesan.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Thermomix choreography from cookbook is replaced by visible casserole physics.
seedanceSegments.risk: Model may puree peas; insist on whole peas popping in cream.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: hiss steam; broth pour; spatula fold; herb sprinkle

seedanceSegments.title: Refroidir et fermer mozzarella
seedanceSegments.description: Temps malléable, boules farcies ~5–6 cm de diamètre, puits mozzarella, fermeture.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Hands + island refs only; spheres and stuffing generated in-segment with hard-cut grammar.
seedanceSegments.risk: Model may oversize spheres (soccer-ball syndrome); enforce ~5–6 cm ø and hand-scale context shot. If mozzarella bleeds outward, regenerate with negatives on blow-outs.
negatives: no spheres larger than ~6 cm diameter
no melon or soccer ball scale

seedanceSegments.title: Double panure mate
seedanceSegments.continuity: Each breading layer is a hard cut; Seedance models pale coats without still-image refs.
seedanceSegments.risk: Crumb may read as sand; specify fine uniform grain.

seedanceSegments.title: Bain 180 et dorure
seedanceSegments.description: Huile chaude, plongeon, halo bulle, rotation dorée, sortie égout.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Pale-to-golden transition authored inside Seedance with tight timing cues; cookware refs only.
seedanceSegments.risk: Avoid under-oil framing that hides bubble physics.

seedanceSegments.title: Blot pull fil cheese
seedanceSegments.description: Score coque, ouverture vapeur, stretch mozzarella, intérieur grains, bol rustique.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Cheese pull and cross-section fully described; rely on Seedance continuity from prior fry segment.
seedanceSegments.risk: Model may liquefy mozzarella or lose peas; reinforce elastic opaque threads and whole peas.

seedanceSegments.title: Fin accompagnée et chef
seedanceSegments.description: Petite assiette, salade option, personnage satisfait macro final.
seedanceSegments.prompt:
Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global Licorn kitchen identity. Use @KitchenIslandWide for breathable context establishing island background. Use @CharacterSheet with @PoseThreeQuarterLeft showing satisfied softened smile after tasting beat.

Describe final styling only in text: torn arancini half on side plate, scattered baby leaves optional, warm macro return to pile of golden spheres with faint steam ribbons cohesive with segment-06 bowl shot—Seedance keeps lighting consistent with @KitchenIslandDefault.

Generate exactly 4 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds.

Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music.

Mandatory timing:
- 0.0-1.2s: torn half on side plate plus scattered baby leaves still life;
- 1.2-2.5s: optional quick greens bowl cue or skip fade if unset;
- 2.5-3.9s: chef satisfaction medium shot Licorn expressive eyes;
- 3.9-5.0s: return macro tighter on golden pile residual steam ribbons.

Global negatives: no speech, no on-screen captions, no music logos.

Mandatory audio: soft cloth move; leafy rustle optional; airy exhale very low.

seedanceSegments.continuity: Closes Licorn cockpit rule character visible gratified beside finished pile.
seedanceSegments.risk: Avoid second context shot back-to-back if greens feel redundant; can compress.
